/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/FES_Thesis_GUI.dir/FES_Thesis_GUI_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FES_Thesis_GUI.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FES_Thesis_GUI.dir/startwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FES_Thesis_GUI.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FES_Thesis_GUI.dir/electrodewindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FES_Thesis_GUI.dir/sessionwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FES_Thesis_GUI.dir/historywindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FES_Thesis_GUI.dir/spihandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FES_Thesis_GUI.dir/gpioexpander.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FES_Thesis_GUI.dir/FES_Thesis_GUI_autogen/3YJK5W5UP7/qrc_logo.cpp.o -o FES_Thesis_GUI  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/local/lib/libpigpio.so /usr/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 -latomic /usr/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf/libGLX.so /usr/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf/libOpenGL.so
